name: Flooat (floating on water) at Zurich Airport
description: Discover Flooat (floating on water) at Zurich Airport in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover Flooat (floating on water) at Zurich Airport in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Wellness and adventure pools
subcategory.description: Book your wellness experience here with an optional mountain lift ticket or your adventure pool. Wellness and adventure pools offer relaxation and entertainment in a refreshing environment. Wellness focuses on tranquility and regeneration with steam baths, saunas, massages, and thermal pools. Aromatherapy, brine baths, and special treatments are offered. Adventure pools combine fun and action – there are slides, lazy rivers, wave pools, and waterfalls, perfect for families and thrill-seekers. Both provide a break from everyday life, depending on what you need, either for relaxation or enjoyment.

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online
